stemHtml: A passenger's baggage is mishandled by state B and inadvertently arrives to state A. What is the correct course of action?

options.a: It will be transported as cargo and the Operator shall present it in State B for customs clearance.
options.b: It will NOT be transported as cargo and returned to the owner because baggage must travel with its owner.
options.c: It will be subject to the taxes of State A and must first be cleared for customs of that State before being transported as cargo.
options.d: It will be cleared if it weighs less than 12 kg.
